subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God, my Lord, my Support and my Hope! By Thy might, Thy majesty, Thy sovereignty and Thy grandeur, I do not wish to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی و سیدی و سندی و رجائی و عزتک و جلالتک و سلطنتک و عظمتک لااحب ان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
